name: ritsu
description: Ritsu AI delivery workflow bundle: init, think, dev, test, hunt, review, plus focused extension skills.

plugins.name: ritsu
plugins.description: Installs the full Ritsu toolkit. Registers the explicit delivery chain under the ritsu namespace: /r-init, /r-think, /r-dev, /r-test, /r-hunt, /r-review, plus extension skills.

plugins.name: ritsu-init
plugins.description: Project initialization. Scans tech stack and architectures, generating the AGENTS.md constraint baseline.

plugins.name: ritsu-think
plugins.description: Domain-adaptive requirement review and architecture design. Strict two-phase workflow producing an anti-corruption Handoff document.

plugins.name: ritsu-dev
plugins.description: Strict domain-adaptive coding pipeline. Defends against blind edits and undefined identifiers, enforcing domain-specific dev disciplines.

plugins.name: ritsu-test
plugins.description: Verification and supplemental testing stage. Runs targeted checks, quality gates, and routes failures back to dev or hunt.

plugins.name: ritsu-optimize
plugins.description: Domain-adaptive code optimization. Only does subtraction and equivalent replacement — never adds features/styles. Simplifies code, improves performance, and adapts to platform.

plugins.name: ritsu-review
plugins.description: Adversarial code review line. Hard Stops for critical issues and domain-semantic reviews, producing a Review Stamp artifact.

plugins.name: ritsu-hunt
plugins.description: Root cause diagnostic engine. Gathers evidence, builds MECE hypotheses, verifies, and locks root cause. Modifying code is strictly forbidden.

plugins.name: ritsu-triage
plugins.description: Inbox Zero machine for issue/PR triage. Dispatches tasks based on context. Does not diagnose technical issues or write business code.
